name: Basic electronics search
query: Search Amazon for CTS 500k guitar pots
expected_behavior: Uses Chrome DevTools MCP to navigate to Amazon
Takes snapshot and reads product data from the accessibility tree
Extracts ASINs paired with product names from the same container elements
Presents products with clean amazon.com/dp/[ASIN] URLs

name: ASIN extraction accuracy
expected_behavior: Pairs ASINs with product names from the same container element

name: Error recovery
expected_behavior: Does not fabricate data to mask error
